footer.noLogs: We don't log visited sites. VPN traffic is encrypted (VLESS · Reality).

home.title: Speed and privacy.
home.subtitle: Proxels is a VPN running on our own servers with automatic failover and self-generated subscriptions. Managed from your dashboard, paid via YooKassa.

benefits.title: Everything important — built in
benefits.subtitle: No need to glue VPN together: infrastructure, billing and privacy work out of the box.

speed.title: Speed
speed.body: Our own VPS in German data centers, direct uplink. No peer-to-peer, no congestion.

stability.title: Failover
stability.body: A dead server is automatically excluded from your subscription. Your client switches to a live one.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: No logs of visited sites. Traffic encrypted via VLESS Reality (TLS 1.3).

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.body: Copy your link, paste into Nekobox / Hiddify / V2RayTun. Works in 10 seconds.

register.title: Sign up
register.body: Email + password, link verification. PD consent — by 152-FZ.

pay.title: Pay
pay.body: Pick 1 to 12 months. YooKassa payment, 54-FZ receipt by email.

connect.title: Connect
connect.body: Your subscription link appears in the dashboard. Copy it or scan the QR in your app.

pricingPreview.title: Pay for exactly the period you need
pricingPreview.subtitle: All plans are unlimited traffic with failover between nodes. Longer term = cheaper month.

apps.title: Works with what you already use
apps.subtitle: Subscription URL is compatible with any VLESS Reality client.

nekobox.name: Nekobox
nekobox.body: Lightweight, fast client with subscription and QR import support.

hiddify.name: Hiddify
hiddify.body: Cross-platform client with automatic best-server selection.

v2raytun.name: V2RayTun
v2raytun.body: Convenient mobile client with quick connect and widget.

what.q: What makes Proxels different from a regular VPN app?
what.a: We don't sell a client app — we sell access to our own Xray infrastructure (VLESS Reality). You use any compatible client like Nekobox, Hiddify, V2RayTun. The subscription URL updates automatically when we add new servers and during failover.

privacy.a: None. The architecture was designed without visited-site logs: access logs are disabled on Xray nodes, and the backend has no endpoints that could surface such information.

failover.q: What happens if a server goes down?
failover.a: A health-check every few seconds updates each node's status. If a server becomes unreachable, it's automatically excluded from the subscription until restored. Your client only uses live nodes.

payment.a: Via YooKassa — cards, SBP, the usual options. After payment you get a 54-FZ receipt by email and the subscription is activated automatically via webhook.

devices.q: How many devices can I connect?
devices.a: The subscription URL has no device limit — use it on phone, laptop and tablet simultaneously. The only real limits are common sense and bandwidth.

support.a: Our Telegram channel — the fastest way. We don't use other social networks.
